headline: 4 Manufacturing Electronics Stocks to Consider on Promising Industry Trends
summary: The Zacks Manufacturing - Electronics industry gains from solid momentum in the manufacturing sector and strength across major end markets. ETN, EMR, ENS and FELE are some notable stocks in the industry.
